ghapi.description: GhApi client construction and dynamically generated GitHub REST endpoint calls.

http_client.description: Outbound GitHub REST API access through GhApi.
Construct a GhApi GitHub REST client.
http_client.notes: Constructor calls require direct-import, alias, or module-qualified provenance resolving to ghapi.core.GhApi; unrelated local GhApi classes are rejected.

github_api_request.description: Invoke a dynamically generated issues, repositories, Git data, or pull-request endpoint on a GhApi receiver.
github_api_request.notes: GhApi creates endpoint methods dynamically. Validator must trace the receiver before the issues, repos, git, or pulls family to a ghapi.core.GhApi constructor or GhApi-annotated parameter. Reject unrelated local API objects even when this file imports GhApi.
